codeReview.summary: The fix now truthfully exposes a deterministic mixed history path for Validation Fixture#LOCAL without changing non-fixture behavior. The commit adds appended fixture matches and routes them through the real /api/match-history + bridge loading flow, preserves the existing stored-matches fixture path, and updates dashboard lifetime/append indicators so the UI can exercise stored paging plus older-history appends end to end. I did not find blocking or non-blocking defects in the scoped implementation.

summary: Pass: commit 5c06c7f resolves the prior VAL-CROSS-003 blocker by adding deterministic appended fixture history through the real runtime path while keeping production users on the normal Riot-backed flow.
